title: oreocarya johnstonii
intro: Oreocarya johnstonii, also known as Johnston's Oreocarya, is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with various medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots. The plant is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antihistaminic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of allergies, fever, and skin irritations. Oreocarya johnstonii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
